_meta.source: Akavarapu & Bhattacharya 2023, Digital Rig Veda Anukramaṇī (WSC/ACL)
_meta.note: Traditional Śaunaka/Kātyāyana anukramaṇī, anuvṛtti resolved. ṛṣi/devatā/meter per sūkta.

9.097.rishi: (1-3)maitrāvaruṇirvasiṭḥaḥ,(4-6)vāsiṣṭha indrapramatiḥ,(7-9)vāsiṣṭho vṛṣagaṇaḥ,(10-12)vāsiṣṭho manyuḥ,(13-15)vāsiṣṭho upamanyuḥ,(16-18)vāsiṣṭho vyāghrapāt,(19-21)vāsiṣṭhaḥ śaktiḥ,(22-24)vāsiṣṭhaḥ karṇaśrut,(25-27)vāsiṣṭho mṛḻīkaḥ,(28-30)vāsiṣṭho vasukraḥ,(31-44)śāktyaḥ parāśaraḥ,(45-58)āṅgirasaḥ kutsaḥ

9.108.rishi: (1-2)śāktyo gaurivītiḥ,(3,14-16)vāsiṣṭhaḥ śaktiḥ,(4-5)āṅgirasa uruḥ,(6-7)bhāradvāja ṛjiśvā,(8-9)āṅgirasa ūrdhvasadmā,(10-11)āṅgirasaḥ kṛtayaśāḥ,(12-13)ṛṇañcayaḥ
